Folder.title: Folder
Folder.description: A collection of photos organized by the user.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this folder.

Photo.title: Photo
Photo.description: A photo captured with GPS metadata.

folderId.description: The ID of the folder this photo belongs to.

imageUrl.description: The base64 encoded image data (must be < 1MB).

latitude.description: Latitude where the photo was taken.

longitude.description: Longitude where the photo was taken.

timestamp.description: The timestamp string from the map camera.

ownerId.description: The UID of the user who owns this photo.

createdAt.description: When the photo record was created.

/photos/{photoId}.description: Collection of photos with GPS data.
